creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 203329
upnp18 - new port

Brings the 1.8.* development branch of devel/upnp into a new port. It is necessary to create a new port because many ports use the 1.6.* branch implemented in devel/upnp and unfortunately the two branches are not compatible.

upnp18 is implemented as a non-conflicting slave port of upnp.
